title: Greek Ordering Activity In 2025 Strategic Focus Amid Global Contraction
section_path: Greek Ordering Activity In 2025 Strategic Focus Amid Global Contraction
section_path_text: Greek Ordering Activity In 2025 Strategic Focus Amid Global Contraction
summary:
Main
The 2025 newbuilding market finds itself firmly on a path of deceleration. Investment appetite for new vessels has notably contracted compared to the past two years, with global orders totaling just 439 ships in the first four months of the year-a fouryear low. This marks a stark decline from 980 ships ordered during the same period in 2024 and 809 in 2023.
